text: 11. PROGRESS PAYMENTS: Draw requests are to be submitted on Contractor's Application for Payment form and in accordance with Contractor's Instructions for Invoicing and Completion of Application for Payment Form (Exhibit B) by the 15th of a month for work completed through the current work period. Payment will be made on or about the last day of the next month following the period covered by the Application for Payment, less 10% retainage, provided payment for same has been made by Owner to Contractor. The retainage will be paid within 60 days after acceptance of the Project by the Owner, provided payment for same has been made by Owner to Contractor. Contractor may require Subcontractor to furnish evidence satisfactory to Contractor, in the form of sworn affidavits, and/or waivers and release of liens, if requested, that all claims for labor, services, equipment and materials furnished under this subcontract have been paid. It shall be a condition precedent to Contractor's obligation to make each payment (progress or final or otherwise) to Subcontractor hereunder that the funds for such payment have first been paid by Owner to Contractor. It is the intent of the parties that if payment from the Owner for all or a portion of the Subcontract Work is never received by Contractor, then Contractor will never have any obligations to pay the Subcontractor for such portion of the Subcontract Work not paid by Owner. Subcontractor hereby expressly assumes the risk of Owner nonpayment for any reason, and the Subcontract Amount set out on page 1 of the Subcontract reflects the assumption of that risk. No payments will be made unless this Subcontractor's rate of progress, work done and material furnished are satisfactory to the Contractor and as herein agreed upon.
